description: 3D model attributions. CC-BY 4.0 legally requires public credit. The /credits page reads this file at build time.

models.notes: Compressed from 114 MB raw → 17.9 MB via Draco + WebP textures (npm run compress-models). Still heavier than ideal for hero asset; recompress to ≤5 MB if welcome scene LCP suffers on slow connections.
